allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f'{r[\\"head_sha\\"][:7]}  {r[\\"conclusion\\"]:8}  {r[\\"display_title\\"][:60]}'\) for r in d['workflow_runs']]")

PowerShell($jobs = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://api.github.com/repos/himkhanna/travelPettyCash/actions/runs/25817018621/jobs"; $jobs.jobs | ForEach-Object { Write-Output "JOB: $\($_.name\) -> $\($_.conclusion\)"; $_.steps | Where-Object { $_.conclusion -eq 'failure' } | ForEach-Object { Write-Output "  FAILED STEP: $\($_.name\)" } })

PowerShell($jobs = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://api.github.com/repos/himkhanna/travelPettyCash/actions/runs/25817018621/jobs"; $jobs.jobs | ForEach-Object { Write-Output "===== $\($_.name\) ====="; $_.steps | ForEach-Object { Write-Output \("{0,-30} {1,-10} {2}" -f $_.name, $_.conclusion, $_.number\) } })
